message:
fix(sharing): fix link code mismatch and grammatical issues

- Fix ShareDialog linkCode/URL mismatch where two different random
  codes were generated - now uses same code for both
- Fix formatRelativeDate singular/plural: "1 weeks" -> "1 week"
- Remove unused MoreVertical import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
